username.title: iRobot Username
username.description: iRobot username for cloud discovery. Only required if you want to use cloud discovery.

password.title: iRobot Password
password.description: iRobot password for cloud discovery. Only required if you want to use cloud discovery.

discovery.title: iRobot Discovery
discovery.description: iRobot discovery of new devices on startup. Once the devices are discovered, you can disable discovery to speed up the startup time.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: The iRobot devices to be exposed.

whiteList.title: White List
whiteList.description: Only the devices in the list will be exposed. If the list is empty, all the devices will be exposed.

blackList.title: Black List
blackList.description: The devices in the list will not be exposed. If the list is empty, no devices will be excluded.

enableServerRvc.title: Enable Server RVC
enableServerRvc.description: Enable the Robot Vacuum Cleaner in server mode. It is mandatory with Apple Home (Apple Home will crash unless you use this mode!)

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable the debug for the plugin (development only)

logLevel.title: Log Level
logLevel.description: Set the log level for the plugin logger and all devices loggers.

logOnFile.title: Log On File
logOnFile.description: Enable logging to file for the plugin logger and all devices loggers. The log files will be stored in the matterbridge plugin directory.

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown (development only)
